args: skip branch-PR derivation on default branch (bug fix): PANE panel shows stale 'pr #480 · merged' for a pane on fab-kit main — gh pr list --head main matches fork PRs whose head ref name is main (mcclawd:main -> sahil87/fab-kit:main); pickBranchPR + --state all durable-merged design makes it permanent. Fix: do not derive a branch-PR for a pane on the repo's DEFAULT branch (git symbolic-ref refs/remotes/origin/HEAD, resolved off the SSE hot path on the background refresher, fail-open on lookup failure).
